package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_returns_http_status: Services that return raw HTTP status codes or transport response metadata.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule176NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule176NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule176NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario176Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule176NegativeService, input Rule176NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
